rulings.Case Title: JOSEPH BARIBEAU VS. HARRY C. THOMAS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Leave To File Second Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday January 10, 2019 line 1. PLAINTIFF JOSEPH BARIBEAU Notice Of Motion For Leave To File Second Amended Complaint GRANTED. Plaintiff shall file the proposed Second Amended Complaint no later than 4:00 pm on January 10, 2019. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: BERTHA P PANG VS. DOUGLAS BAIRD ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Enforce Settlement
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday January 10, 2019 line 2. DEFENDANT DOUGLAS BAIRD Notice Of Motion To Enforce Settlement continued to January 28, 2019. Both parties are ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide courtesy copies of moving papers and opposition to Department 501 no later than January 14, 2019, with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: RAMESH SHRESTHA VS. HOTEL SUNRISE, INC. ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Costs
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday January 10, 2019 line 3. Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Costs GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Expert fees are stricken in the amount of $5,164.12. Defendants cite no authority addressing Plaintiff's argument that these costs are not allowed pursuant to CCP § 1033.5(b). Prevailing Defendants Ketan Patel and Hotel Sunrise, LLC are entitled to Filing Fees and Deposition Costs in the amount of $10,130.88. The Court finds that all claims are interrelated as to those who were deposed. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: RAMESH SHRESTHA VS. HOTEL SUNRISE, INC. ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Attorney Fees
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday January 10, 2019 line 3. DEFENDANT HOTEL SUNRISE, INC., KIRITKUMAR PATEL, SHAKUNTLA PATEL Notice Of Motion For Attorney Fees CONTINUED to January 31, 2019. Both parties are ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide courtesy copies of moving papers, opposition, reply, and all exhibits to Department 501 no later than January 14, 2019, with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: LINDA COOKS VS. WELLS FARGO HOME MORTGAGE ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday January 10, 2019 line 4. DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT CONTINUED to February 7, 2019 per joint stipulation of parties. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: MARIA DEL RAYO VASQUEZ VS. NATIONSTAR MORTGAGE LLC A BUSINESS ENTITY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Reconsideration
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday January 10, 2019 line 5. PLAINTIFF MARIA VASQUEZ Notice Of Motion And Motion For Reconsideration GRANTED per stipulation of parties. The Order Sustaining Defendants' Demurrer without leave to amend is vacated, and Defendants' Demurrer will be reheard on January 28, 2019. Per stipulation, Plaintiff will file an opposition to Defendants' Demurrer no later than January 10, 2019. Defendants will file a reply, if any, no later than January 17, 2019. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: MAXIMO INVESTMENTS, LLC VS. ESTHER EAMES, LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday January 10, 2019 line 6. DEFENDANT ESTHER EAMES, LLC AMENDED MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT continued to January 22, 2019. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide a courtesy copies of all moving and reply papers to Department 501 no later than January 15, 2019, with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. Opposing party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide a courtesy copies of all opposition papers to Department 501 no later than January 15, 2019, with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: ALI R. POORSINA VS. PEAK FORECLOSURE SERVICES, INC. ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday January 10, 2019 line 7. PLAINTIFF ALI POORSINA Notice Of Complaint OFF CALENDAR per moving party's request. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: AMANDA OWEN-WALKUP VS. GENTRY JOHNSON ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday January 10, 2019 line 8. DEFENDANT GENTRY JOHNSON, RAYMOND VITALE, TODD THORPE DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint alleges a cause of action for unlawful detainer and Defendants have not demonstrated that the Notice of Termination of Tenancy is deficient. Defendants' Request for Judicial Notice is GRANTED. = (501/CFH)
